steps: Read coordinator role contract, coordinator policy, exception policy, and refresh seeds.
Lock manual intake and record coordinator preflight.
Generate governance lock and research plan from the Admin-provided question and hypothesis.
Run proposal rounds with Executor and Reviewer.
Drive execution, honest degradation or trusted dependency recovery, review, archive, publish, and final Telegram delivery without asking Admin for runtime decisions.
Read coordinator role contract, coordinator policy, exception policy, and refresh seeds.
Run morning survey and send the daily brief.
Wait only until the configured brief deadline for an Admin override.
If no override arrives, self-select a topic, run proposal rounds, then drive execution, review, archive, publish, and final Telegram delivery autonomously.
